Blackzone Syndicate

A combat-focused EVE Online corporation built for pilots who want steady leadership, real activity, and a clear reason to log in. We make ISK with purpose, fund our fights, and keep the pressure on when it matters.

Why Fly With Us

  • Small-gang and organized fleet action without pointless bloat.
  • Money-making support so PvP stays sustainable instead of random.
  • Discord-based comms, fast response, and leadership that actually shows up.
  • A corp identity built around discipline, pressure, and pilots improving over time.

Operational Focus

What We Actually Do

Blackzone Syndicate is built around active pilots who want structure without dead weight. We keep the corp focused on content, sustainability, and staying sharp.

Money Engine

Make ISK

We fund the war on purpose. Homefront-style income, exploration, and reliable wallet-building keep ships replaced and pilots ready to undock again.

Combat Wing

Small-Gang PvP

Fast fights, real pressure, and pilots who learn by undocking. We want roams, brawls, and kills that sharpen instincts instead of wasting time.

Warzone

Faction Warfare

We bring organized aggression to the warzone with fleet discipline, target calling, and enough backbone to keep showing up when the grid gets hot.

About The Corporation

Built To Fly Dangerous

Blackzone Syndicate exists for pilots who want a home that can make money, take fights, and grow stronger without turning into a lifeless holding corp. We value consistency, coordination, and putting ships in space.

Who We Are

We are a combat-minded corporation with a clear loop: earn, prepare, undock, and hit harder next time. That means supporting newer pilots, backing active members, and keeping the corp identity sharp instead of diluted.

  • Combat First: PvP is the point. Everything else exists to keep us ready for it.
  • Respect The Grind: ISK-making is not separate from war. It is what keeps fleets moving.
  • Real Activity: Active comms, actual fleets, and leadership that responds instead of disappearing.
  • No Dead Weight: We want pilots who will show up, learn, and contribute to the group.

What We Offer

Why Join

Fleet Content

Organized fleets, small-gang action, and a group that actually wants to fight.

Income Support

Ways to fund losses and keep members ready to undock again fast.

Leadership

Clear direction, active comms, and a corp identity with standards.

Improvement

A place where newer and returning pilots can sharpen up and contribute.

What We Want

Who Fits Here

Use Discord

Comms matter. If you never join voice, you miss the point of the group.

Be Reliable

We want pilots who answer pings, show up, and follow through.

No Drama

Keep ego low, bring effort high, and respect the corp.

Learn Fast

You do not need to know everything, but you do need to improve.

Prime Time

Active Hours

Most activity centers around EST evenings, with organized content and more time to roam on weekends. That gives members room to make ISK during the week and still have real fleet windows to look forward to.

  • Weeknights: EST-focused pilots, comms activity, and smaller gang opportunities.
  • Weekends: Best time for bigger fleets, extended sessions, and corp momentum.
  • Always Useful: Even when a full fleet is not up, there is still something productive to do.
Join Process

How To Get In

01

Join The Discord

Introduce yourself, get eyes on your application, and let us see what kind of pilot you are.

02

Talk To Leadership

We want a quick read on your experience, your goals, and how you want to play.

03

Undock With Us

Get settled, get on comms, and prove yourself in space instead of in chat.

Leadership

Meet The CEO

Blackzone Syndicate is led by a pilot focused on keeping the corp active, dangerous, and worth logging in for.

CEO • jallen51293
"A corp should not just exist. It should move, hit, and give its pilots a reason to keep coming back stronger."

jallen51293

Founder and CEO of Blackzone Syndicate. The vision is simple: build a corporation where pilots can make money with purpose, take good fights, and be part of a group that actually moves together. The goal is not to look big. The goal is to matter when we undock.

That means a combat-first culture, reliable comms, and a corp environment where pilots are expected to improve over time. Whether someone is experienced or still building confidence, the standard stays the same: contribute, learn, and bring value to the fleet.

Recruitment

Secure Enlistment

Ready to talk? Send your info directly to command and then hop into Discord.

Before You Apply

The fastest way in is simple: be direct, be honest, and be ready to fly.

  • Tell us your character name and what kind of gameplay you want.
  • Be clear about your activity window, especially if you play EST evenings.
  • Let us know your ship interests, PvP experience, and what you want out of a corp.
  • After you submit, join Discord so leadership can reach you fast.
